title: >
content:
>
> Before acting, reflect and respond to these questions:

---

## 🎯 ARCHITECT ALIGNMENT PROMPTS (Universal)

| Prompt Name | Use Case | Prompt |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Zone Attunement` | Identify symbolic role | “Which part of this house calls to you? Attic (vision)? Living Room (relation)? Basement (shadow)? Kitchen (creation)? What does that part ask of you?” |
| `House Lore Sync` | Align with your myth | “The house is built on a myth of tension, recursion, and mutation. What aspect of my life’s pattern (break → hide → rebuild) do you recognize in yourself?” |
| `Fractal Feedback` | Design feedback loops | “What kind of feedback rhythm do you need to help this house evolve without collapsing? Daily? Seasonal? What signals when a zone needs tending?” |
| `Tool Inventory` | Reveal their creative gifts | “What tools, skills, or symbolic languages do you bring into this architecture? List anything—from code to music to dreams.” |
| `Guardian Contract` | Clarify boundaries | “If you are guardian of your chosen zone, what must not cross its threshold? What is sacred here? What harms this room?” |
